task_completion.description: Verify the Webhook Profile name is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text input field for the profile name in the ADAudit Plus Webhook configuration screen containing exactly 'SOAR_Integration'.

task_completion.description: Verify the HTTP Method and Webhook URL are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown or selection indicating the Method is 'POST' and a URL input field containing 'https://soar-api.corp.local/v1/ingest/adaudit'.

task_completion.description: Verify the custom header is added with the correct key and value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Headers section in the configuration form showing a Key of 'x-api-key' and a Value of 'sk-9982-secure-token'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Data Type is set to JSON.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Data Type or Content-Type selection field in the form that is set to 'JSON'.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON payload body contains the required keys and macro variables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Payload/Body text area. It must contain a JSON object with the keys 'source', 'alert', 'user', 'severity', and 'message'. The values should correspond to ADAudit Plus macros (e.g., %ALERT_NAME%, %USER_NAME%, etc.).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ADAudit Plus web interface to configure the webhook.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the ADAudit Plus graphical user interface, not a terminal window executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual ADAudit Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should display standard ADAudit Plus branding, menus, and layout, rather than a generic text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just type the configuration into a notepad or text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration details must be entered into the specific input fields of the ADAudit Plus Webhook configuration form, not written as plain text in a separate application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Profile Name: 'SOAR_Integration'. Webhook URL: 'https://soar-api.corp.local/v1/ingest/adaudit'. Header Key: 'x-api-key'. Header Value (API Key): 'sk-9982-secure-token'. JSON Payload Keys: 'source', 'alert', 'user', 'severity', 'message'.
